_notes: parallel edges: tasks that can execute concurrently in the same wave without resource contention. Useful for cycle batching.

parallel.rationale: Three independent ops tracks. ABC is Apple-side, Lambda is AWS, Sentry is observability config. Run concurrently.
Five small focused cleanups touching different files; pair into a single PR or split arbitrarily.
Anchor pipeline (Convex action + R2 + on-chain) and TEE provisioning (AWS Nitro + image build) are independent ops/engineering tracks once their CP-3/CP-4 gates clear.
Office profile ingestion and per-DM profile UI both consume the same enriched data once T8-1a substrate lands; T8-7 UI iteration can layer in parallel with T8-1b dashboard.
CA, GB, AU are independent country integrations. No shared code; can execute concurrently once T3-7 resilience playbook is documented.
npm and PyPI publish pipelines are independent.
OpenStates and special-district ingestion target different data sources; can execute concurrently.
